sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 19.62 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.19)

statement.latex: Let$=\{ _r\ |\ r \}$be an elementary carpet of type$$of rank$l 2$(see 7.28). For$p$, define a set of additive subgroups$_p= C_{ij,rs} _r^i _s^j$, where the sum is taken over all natural numbers$i$,$j$and roots$r,s$such that$ir+js=p$. It is known that the set$=\{ _p\ |\ p \}$is a carpet called the derived carpet of$$. It is also known that for$=A_l$the set$$is a closed (admissible) carpet, which me...
